mapper.select: SELECT id FROM cau_road ORDER BY geom <-> ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{lng}, #{lat}), 4326) LIMIT 1

WITH start_road AS ( SELECT geom FROM cau_road ORDER BY geom <-> ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{startLng}, #{startLat}), 4326) LIMIT 1 ), end_road AS ( SELECT geom FROM cau_road ORDER BY geom <-> ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{endLng}, #{endLat}), 4326) LIMIT 1 ), start_point AS ( SELECT ST_ClosestPoint(ST_Union(start_road.geom), ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{startLng}, #{startLat}), 4326)) AS geom FROM start_road ), end_point AS ( SELECT ST_ClosestPoint(ST_Union(end_road.geom), ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{endLng}, #{endLat}), 4326)) AS geom FROM end_road ) SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_MakeLine( (SELECT geom FROM start_point), (SELECT geom FROM end_point) )) as geojson
